CustomField.description: Ce champ est calculé automatiquement et est utilisé pour contrôler le passage du statut du candidat vers « En attente d’approbation »
CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Medecin", AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Name)), NOT(ISBLANK(Phone)), NOT(ISBLANK(email_intmed__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(CodeIBAN__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(CodeINPE__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(AssuranceRC__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(BillingStreet)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(TypeMedecin__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(SpecialiteMedecin__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(Banque_Principale__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(RIB__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(IdentifiantFiscal__c)) ), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Avocat", AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Name)), NOT(ISBLANK(Phone)), NOT(ISBLANK(IdentifiantFiscal__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Numero_Barreau__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Barreau_d_appartenance__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(Golden_Id__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Qualite__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(Patente__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(IntituleCourtPrestataire__c)) ), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Expert_RD", AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Name)), NOT(ISBLANK(Phone)), OR( NOT(ISBLANK(email_intmed__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Email__c)) ), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Qualite__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(RepresentantLegal__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(AssuranceRC__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(Patente__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Numero_de_registre_de_commerce__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(MethodeDePaiement__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(RIB__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Banque_Principale__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(IdentifiantFiscal__c)) ), false ) ) )
CustomField.label: isPopulated_Expert
